reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use GitHub tool to check authenticated user identity and return the GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260415-183500-0923" agent in the sidebar — agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" — confirmed the agent status displayed as "idle" at the top
Typed and sent message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — message was successfully submitted and a session "GitHub Username Verification Request" was created
Agent status changed to "working" — agent began processing the request
GitHub account access request card appeared — a dialog asking "Allow access to GitHub to check your username and identity?" was displayed with GitHub account already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — card was processed and agent resumed working
API Request Review dialog appeared asking to allow "GET /user" on GitHub API — permission dialog was displayed
Clicked "Allow Once" button to permit the API request — permission was granted and agent continued processing
Waited for final response and it appeared successfully — agent completed work in 1m 6s

Verified response includes GitHub username — response clearly displays: "Your GitHub username is yiw190. You have a GitHub Pro plan, 3 public repos, 13 private repos, and your account was created on May 29, 2023."
Took screenshot of successful response — full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation flow and final GitHub username response
